ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monsters" (
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the monster */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Health points (HP) of the monster */,
  "ko" INTEGER /* Knockout (KO) value of the monster */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense value of the monster */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed value of the monster */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence value of the monster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the monster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monster part */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster the part belongs to */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the monster part (e.g., Head, Neck, Stomach) */,
  "cut" INTEGER /* Weakness to cut attacks */,
  "impact" INTEGER /* Weakness to impact attacks */,
  "shot" INTEGER /* Weakness to shot attacks */,
  "fire" INTEGER /* Weakness to fire attacks */,
  "water" INTEGER /* Weakness to water attacks */,
  "thunder" INTEGER /* Weakness to thunder attacks */,
  "ice" INTEGER /* Weakness to ice attacks */,
  "dragon" INTEGER /* Weakness to dragon attacks */,
  "exhaust" INTEGER /* Weakness to exhaust attacks */,
  "weakness_description" TEXT /* Description of the part's weakness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_parts_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type */,
  "attack_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type (e.g., Cut, Impact, Shot) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack type */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage (e.g., physical, magical) */,
  "elemental_type" TEXT /* Elemental type (e.g., fire, water, thunder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_attack_weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster */,
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attack type */,
  "weakness_value" INTEGER /* Weakness value of the monster to the attack type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_attack_weaknesses_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_id") REFERENCES attacks ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_attack_weaknesses_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_elemental_weaknesses" (
  "weakness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weakness */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster */,
  "elemental_type" TEXT /* Elemental type */,
  "weakness_value" INTEGER /* Weakness value of the monster to the elemental type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weakness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_elemental_weaknesses_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monster_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "monster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monster */,
  "reward_item" TEXT /* Name of the reward item */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monster_rewards_monster_id FOREIGN KEY ("monster_id") REFERENCES monsters ("monster_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each monster part
ID of the monster the part belongs to
Name of the monster part (e.g., Head, Neck, Stomach)
Unique identifier for each attack type
Name of the attack type (e.g., Cut, Impact, Shot)
Weakness value of the monster to the attack type
Weakness value of the monster to the elemental type
